records.m_Talk_ENG: Still no word from HQ, Dame Liv?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still no word from HQ, Dame Liv?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still no word from HQ, Dame Liv?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nope. I think the Corruption ray fried the transmitter. Totally busted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nope. I think the Corruption ray fried the transmitter. Totally busted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nope. I think the Corruption ray fried the transmitter. Totally busted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Arius, can't you fix it with your powers?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Arius, can't you fix it with your powers?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Arius, can't you fix it with your powers?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sorry, Liv... My powers don't work on machines.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sorry, Liv... My powers don't work on machines.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sorry, Liv... My powers don't work on machines.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh, really? I thought they worked on machines too for some reason.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh, really? I thought they worked on machines too for some reason.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh, really? I thought they worked on machines too for some reason.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your mood shifts far too easily, Dame Liv. With things so unpredictable, we must stay alert for any C.O.s that might appear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your mood shifts far too easily, Dame Liv. With things so unpredictable, we must stay alert for any C.O.s that might appear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your mood shifts far too easily, Dame Liv. With things so unpredictable, we must stay alert for any C.O.s that might appear.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
As my great-great-grandfather from House Lowell used to say, "Peace and crisis are two sides of the same coin, and preparing for both is a knight's duty." Now, to explain that, we must begin from the time he served in Auvergne
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aagh, not the great-great-grandpa speech again! So what if the comms are down? Stop harping on it!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aagh, not the great-great-grandpa speech again! So what if the comms are down? Stop harping on it!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aagh, not the great-great-grandpa speech again! So what if the comms are down? Stop harping on it!

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not trying to side with Dame Liv, but I do agree with her this time, Deputy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not trying to side with Dame Liv, but I do agree with her this time, Deputy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not trying to side with Dame Liv, but I do agree with her this time, Deputy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the sudden Corruption disaster, all TASKFORCEs have been deployed to the center of each branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the sudden Corruption disaster, all TASKFORCEs have been deployed to the center of each branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the sudden Corruption disaster, all TASKFORCEs have been deployed to the center of each branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even if HQ is short on main forces, the odds of it being in actual danger are slim.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even if HQ is short on main forces, the odds of it being in actual danger are slim.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even if HQ is short on main forces, the odds of it being in actual danger are slim.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And like Liv said, the transmission issues are probably just due to the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And like Liv said, the transmission issues are probably just due to the Corruption ray.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And like Liv said, the transmission issues are probably just due to the Corruption ray.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Exactly! It's not like we've been gone for a whole month. What's there to worry about?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Exactly! It's not like we've been gone for a whole month. What's there to worry about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Exactly! It's not like we've been gone for a whole month. What's there to worry about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Still...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Still...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Still...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Fione. Have a moment?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Fione. Have a moment?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Fione. Have a moment?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Dame Medea? I'm glad to hear from you. We were worried since we couldn't get through to HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Dame Medea? I'm glad to hear from you. We were worried since we couldn't get through to HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Dame Medea? I'm glad to hear from you. We were worried since we couldn't get through to HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If everything's fine on HQ, we might consider sending reinforcements to another defense line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If everything's fine on HQ, we might consider sending reinforcements to another defense line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If everything's fine on HQ, we might consider sending reinforcements to another defense line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...So it's the same for you. HQ isn't responding on your side either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...So it's the same for you. HQ isn't responding on your side either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...So it's the same for you. HQ isn't responding on your side either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, what? Weren't you stationed at HQ?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, what? Weren't you stationed at HQ?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, what? Weren't you stationed at HQ?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I was, until recently. Something came up over at the Lotus branch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I was, until recently. Something came up over at the Lotus branch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I was, until recently. Something came up over at the Lotus branch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It turns out Dame Leonhardt is tracking the individual responsible for this abnormal Counterside Effect...
records.m_Talk_DEU: It turns out Dame Leonhardt is tracking the individual responsible for this abnormal Counterside Effect...
records.m_Talk_FRA: It turns out Dame Leonhardt is tracking the individual responsible for this abnormal Counterside Effect...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But after communications with Lotus were reestablished, some of the details didn't add up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But after communications with Lotus were reestablished, some of the details didn't add up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But after communications with Lotus were reestablished, some of the details didn't add up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean the Order received false intel?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean the Order received false intel?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean the Order received false intel?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...It can't be!
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...It can't be!
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...It can't be!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's not jump to conclusions. It could've just been a breakdown in communication between members.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's not jump to conclusions. It could've just been a breakdown in communication between members.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's not jump to conclusions. It could've just been a breakdown in communication between members.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... if possible, return to HQ immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... if possible, return to HQ immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... if possible, return to HQ immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's just a coincidence, but right now, most forces are away from HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe it's just a coincidence, but right now, most forces are away from HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe it's just a coincidence, but right now, most forces are away from HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Deputy? What's with the long face?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Deputy? What's with the long face?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Deputy? What's with the long face?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The defense line held. It's time to head back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The defense line held. It's time to head back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The defense line held. It's time to head back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right, let's move out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right, let's move out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right, let's move out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yay! We made it back safe and sound!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yay! We made it back safe and sound!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yay! We made it back safe and sound!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Great work, Sir Martin. Anything happen at HQ while we were gone?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Great work, Sir Martin. Anything happen at HQ while we were gone?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Great work, Sir Martin. Anything happen at HQ while we were gone?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You too, Sir Hansol. Nothing out of the ordinary during the shift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You too, Sir Hansol. Nothing out of the ordinary during the shift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You too, Sir Hansol. Nothing out of the ordinary during the shift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless you count Andrew dozing off or Jacob skipping his rotation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless you count Andrew dozing off or Jacob skipping his rotation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless you count Andrew dozing off or Jacob skipping his rotation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hey! Snitch much?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hey! Snitch much?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hey! Snitch much?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Like you've never slacked off either!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Like you've never slacked off either!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Like you've never slacked off either!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad everything's fine.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad everything's fine.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad everything's fine.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
Good work, everyo
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
Good work, everyo
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
Good work, everyo
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?

records.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Martin. What happened to the injury you got from that C.O. earlier?

records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Injury? What are you talking about?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Injury? What are you talking about?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Martin. Take off your helmet. Just for a sec.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Martin. Take off your helmet. Just for a sec.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious, Dame Liv? What would I be showing off by taking it off here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaahh!!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaahh!!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-they're... turning into C.O.s?!

records.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s in the form of knights... No way!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You can't be serious, Deputy! You're gonna fight them?!

root.m_Talk_DEU: Like you've never slacked off either!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Like you've never slacked off either!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha! As you can see, it's been totally different here compared to out there. Why do you ask?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't even start. Deputy was freaking out, thinking something had happened at HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, listening to her nagging was worse than fighting C.O.s.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I wasn't that bad, Dame Liv. Still, you were right this time.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm glad everything's fine.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm glad everything's fine.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm glad everything's fine.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Deputy. No one in their right mind would try to attack the Order's HQ.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's what I've been saying. Our Deputy just overthinks everything.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's all from stress. You should go home early and get some rest today.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. I agree. Let's wrap things up here for the day.

root.m_Talk_ENG:
Good work, everyo
8g
root.m_Talk_DEU:
Good work, everyo
8g
root.m_Talk_FRA:
Good work, everyo
8g

root.m_Talk_ENG: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Fione? What's wrong all of a sudden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Hansol, watch over Arius. Dame Liv, come with me.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You've lost it, Deputy! Why are you aiming your spear at them?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's right, Deputy. What's the meaning of this...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sir Martin. What happened to the injury you got from that C.O. earlier?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sir Martin. What happened to the injury you got from that C.O. earlier?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sir Martin. What happened to the injury you got from that C.O. earlier?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? Injury? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? Injury? What are you talking about?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? Injury? What are you talking about?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Martin. Take off your helmet. Just for a sec.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Martin. Take off your helmet. Just for a sec.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Martin. Take off your helmet. Just for a sec.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you serious, Dame Liv? What would I be showing off by taking it off here?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you serious, Dame Liv? What would I be showing off by taking it off here?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you serious, Dame Liv? What would I be showing off by taking it off here?

I'm

I'm

root.m_Talk_FRA:
I'm

root.m_Talk_ENG: Khhhkk!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Khhhkk!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Khhhkk!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, aaaah!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, aaaah!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, aaaah!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaaahh!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaaahh!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaaahh!!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-they're... turning into C.O.s?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-they're... turning into C.O.s?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-they're... turning into C.O.s?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: C.O.s in the form of knights... No way!
root.m_Talk_DEU: C.O.s in the form of knights... No way!
root.m_Talk_FRA: C.O.s in the form of knights... No way!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Tch!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Tch!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Tch!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All knights, prepare for combat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: All knights, prepare for combat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: All knights, prepare for combat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You can't be serious, Deputy! You're gonna fight them?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You can't be serious, Deputy! You're gonna fight them?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You can't be serious, Deputy! You're gonna fight them?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Get a hold of yourself, Dame Liv! They've already turned into C.O.s!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Get a hold of yourself, Dame Liv! They've already turned into C.O.s!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Get a hold of yourself, Dame Liv! They've already turned into C.O.s!

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we hesitate now, we'll only lose more lives!
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we hesitate now, we'll only lose more lives!
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we hesitate now, we'll only lose more lives!

root.m_Talk_ENG: B-But...
root.m_Talk_DEU: B-But...
root.m_Talk_FRA: B-But...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Just hang in there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Just hang in there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Just hang in there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll... make sure to end your suffering!!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll... make sure to end your suffering!!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll... make sure to end your suffering!!
